_description: Extended-seed robustness matrix for full-paper upgrade (#51). Seeds 11/17/23 are historical canonical seeds; 29/31 are added for the extended 5-seed comparison.
name: rough_terrain_extended_seeds
_promotion_rule: SC-PPO must remain task-valid and continue to beat the revised heuristic anchor on Isaac dynamic-smoothness metrics without introducing multiple checkpoint-0 collapses across the extended seed set.
_mujoco_replay: Only for task-valid selected checkpoints on added seeds; preserve historical 3-seed MuJoCo record.
